---
title: "Courses"
format: html
---

## R for Novices

**New to data analysis? No prior programming experience?**

Sign up for my free email course!

[R for Novices Email Course](https://heidiseibold.kit.com/d949a4d18c)

Go a step further with the free ebook

[R for Novice Programmers: First Steps with R and RStudio](https://wokech.github.io/r4novice/)

## Properties of Biomaterials - EBM 301 (2026)

[Course Website](courses/ebm301/biomaterials.qmd)
